settings.headline: Begin your Skinfluence evaluation.
settings.subhead: Start with a provider-reviewed intake designed to understand your goals, skin history, and treatment fit before anything moves forward.

settings.label: Designed to feel clear, simple, and easy to complete
Approval depends on fit, not everyone will be eligible

settings.headline: What to expect before you begin
What happens here
settings.body:
Once the live intake is connected, this page will hand users into the secure evaluation flow.

  • Share treatment goals, skin background, and any relevant context
  • Understand what information may be needed for provider review
  • Know what happens next if approved, or if more information is needed

settings.headline: Before you start
settings.body:
Skinfluence should use this page to set calm, realistic expectations before the intake begins.

  • The evaluation should feel clear and straightforward
  • Users should know not everyone will be eligible for treatment
  • Questions about the process should have an obvious support path

settings.title: Complete the intake
settings.body: Users should provide the information needed for review, including goals, relevant skin background, and any context that may affect treatment fit.

settings.title: Receive provider review
settings.body: A licensed provider reviews the submission and determines whether treatment is appropriate or whether more information is needed.

settings.title: Move into care if approved
settings.body: If approved, users move into the monthly treatment model, onboarding guidance, and the ongoing Skinfluence support experience.

settings.headline: Questions before the evaluation opens?
settings.subhead: Use the FAQ or support page if you want more clarity on pricing, treatment fit, or what the process will involve.
